calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioners: Dusha Lin and Wilson Chung, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Autumn Chung, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Nathan Chung.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Reset To Sep-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Linda Chavez
Petitioner Dush Lin (mother) was sworn and examined. The petition lacks notice or father's consent. Matter was continued to September 21, 2006 for father to personally appear and give consent to the petition.
